meta.description: Validate code owner review requirements are enabled when CODEOWNERS file exists via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.require_code_owner_review == true)) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.code_owner_approval_required) && predicates[0].data.values.code_owner_approval_required == true)

assessment.message: CODEOWNER approval is required before merging

error.message: CODEOWNER approval is not required before merging
error.guidance: GitHub: Enable 'Require review from Code Owners' in branch ruleset. GitLab: Set code_owner_approval_required to true in branch protection.
